challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new div element after your .medium element.
Your new div should have a class attribute set to daily-value small-text.
Your new div element should have a p element.
Your new p element should have the text % Daily Value *.
Your new p element should have a class attribute set to bold right.

description: Kreiraj novi div element ispod tvog .medium elementa. Daj mu atribut class postavljen na daily-value small-text. Unutar ovog novog div, dodaj p element sa tekstom % Daily Value *, i postavi atribut class na bold right.
